dynamic_rules.description: Avoid trading when confidence levels are below 50, as indicated by light_skip decisions with conf <= 50. This suggests insufficient conviction in the setup.
Be cautious when delta is positive but price isn't advancing (or vice versa), as this may indicate trapped buyers/sellers. Look for confirming volume spikes or delta reversals.
Avoid entries when big trades are concentrated in wicks rather than body absorption, unless trading IMBALANCE_HUNTING on M1 where momentum supersedes structural closes.
Wait for the Initiative phase (delta aggressively flipping direction to sweep the book) before entering trades to confirm true breakouts. DOES NOT APPLY to IMBALANCE_HUNTING.

dynamic_rules.topic: Early Exit Prevention in Profitable Trades
dynamic_rules.description: Avoid early exits in profitable trades when momentum and delta alignment are still confirming the trade direction, to maximize profit potential.
Avoid overtrading by limiting the number of consecutive trades in the same direction during imbalance phases.
Avoid placing stops directly above/below the extreme of a wick to prevent exposure to retail liquidity pools. Instead, hide stops in the 'belly' of the volume profile.
